hooks.command: if echo "$CC_EDIT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.sol$'; then forge build 2>&1 | tail -5; elif echo "$CC_EDIT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.ts$'; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
if echo "$CC_WRITE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.sol$'; then forge build 2>&1 | tail -5; elif echo "$CC_WRITE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.ts$'; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
if echo "$CC_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo "Current branch: $(git branch --show-current)"; fi
